Statistics recorded during both regulation time and overtime count unless the time period specifies otherwise (e.g., "regulation only"). If the game is cancelled before starting, markets resolve to last fair price. If cancelled after starting and not resumed within 24 hours, markets resolve to last fair price except for thresholds already reached. If an entity (player or team) withdraws before the game, markets on that entity resolve to last fair price. If a player is injured, retires, or is disqualified during the game after playing at least one second, markets settle based on end-of-game statistics.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump says TrumpRx as part of Site Visit at Thermo Fisher Scientific, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Site Visit at Thermo Fisher Scientific will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Site Visit at Thermo Fisher Scientific will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. - Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event. 
The event must be opened to the press for a live televised or streamed event to qualify.
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  
The event will resolve based on Donald Trump speaking in an official capacity. If Donald Trump is or is not present during a livestream, and does not speak in an official capacity the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic).

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.

markets.rules_primary: If Immanuel Quickley records 10+ Points in the Toronto at New Orleans professional basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 11, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the Toronto at New Orleans professional basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 11, 2026. If a player is active but never takes the court, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game the market settles based on the player's points recorded.
